#  View a Labor Budget to Actual Report (iOS) 
##  Background 
The Labor Budget to Actual Report compares the hours recorded in the Timesheets tool to the imported Budgeted Hours at a cost code level. The report is broken down by cost code and includes % of hours used, budgeted hours, job to date hours, and remaining hours.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-ios/permissions)


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Import a Unit Quantity Based Budget](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/tutorials/import-a-unit-quantity-based-budget)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Timesheets** tool on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap **Reports** ![Icon Reports Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ecc75fe175b2ef68de4984f7a8a01b4e/8db72722ae60ae103dee4b34d4f81fd3/icon-reports-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18).  
![Timesheets Ios View Timesheet Report](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/72d44b9edab491775f3393ebbe6a0168/94617e5e288ae07bf085f8db521e07a7/timesheets-ios-view-timesheet-report.png?fm=webp)
  3. Tap the **Hours** tab to view the project's Labor Hours Summary Report.  
![Timesheets Ios Report Hours Tab](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/16fb0892a7ce0682507162b0894bb659/741f4e272e343e98560dcdde3a4bbdd5/timesheets-ios-report-hours-tab.png?fm=webp)
  4. To return to the Timesheets tool, tap **Close**.


## See Also
  * [View Quantities on a Timesheet (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-ios/tutorials/view-quantities-on-a-timesheet-ios)
  * [View a Field Production Report (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-ios/tutorials/view-field-production-report-ios)
  * [Add Quantities to a Timesheet (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-ios/tutorials/add-quantities-to-a-timesheet-ios)

description: How to view a labor budget to actual report on an iOS device.
